ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-29-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Pelavin for Tauch Wong (Administrator).

The Court stated that it is still looking for a petition for final distribution. Mr. Pelavin stated that he is in a position to prepare that quite soon and that the delay has to do with the properties that are located in Arizona and Oregon. The Order to Appear is off calendar. Status on close of estate is continued to February 26, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Pelavin is to file his petition no later than February 21, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-29-2019 Continued To Feb-26-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-09-2019 Continued To Jan-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Continued To Jan-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on January 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Duong. Not reported.
